category_sources: source_facts.description states the CLI interacts with the Common Architecture Language Model; official FINOS repository describes Architecture as Code and CALM tooling.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands CALM; official FINOS Architecture as Code repository lists CLI as a project for CALM.
docs_sources: Official CALM site hosts tutorials including Setup & CLI; source_facts.homepage points to the official FINOS monorepo CLI path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; source_facts.homepage is the official FINOS architecture-as-code repository CLI path, so the monorepo is the official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CALM CLI; official FINOS repository describes Common Architecture Language Model and Architecture as Code projects.
